message: bd-kfuj: cache premium packs offline + update notifications

files.patch:
@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-d43s","title":"Feature: Prompt Dependency Graph + Impact Analysis","description":"## Background
Prompts are reused across packs, workflows, schedules, and share links. Pro users need to understand what will break if a prompt changes.

## Scope
- Maintain graph edges: prompt -> packs, workflows, schedules, share links, and collections.
- Impact analysis when editing: show downstream items and required confirmations.
- Graph view with filters and export.
- CLI: `jfp impact <prompt>` and `jfp graph export`.
- Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content).

## Deliverables
- Graph storage model + API endpoints.
- UI graph explorer + impact warnings.
- CLI commands with JSON export.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Graph integrity rules and edge updates on edits/deletes.
- Impact analysis accuracy.

### Integration Tests
- Changes in prompts propagate to dependent items.
- Graph export format is stable.

### E2E Tests
- Edit prompt -> impact modal -> confirm -> updates applied.
- CLI impact -> matches UI counts.

## Success Criteria
- Users can see downstream dependencies before editing.
- Accidental breaking changes are prevented.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:14.088091888Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T18:28:25.911806225Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T18:28:25.911787500Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-gljk","title":"Web: Recommendation tag preferences (boost + hide)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:03:05.117780544Z","created_by":"VioletWolf","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:03:11.676718029Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T01:03:11.676695367Z","close_reason":"Completed: added boost/hide tags inputs to /settings/recommendations (applies on blur)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gljk","depends_on_id":"bd-2vsu","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:03:05.117780544Z","created_by":"VioletWolf"}]}
 {"id":"bd-kbl0","title":"Audit remaining web API endpoints","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:18:16.103471461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T19:19:01.860434052Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T19:19:01.860408715Z","close_reason":"Audited all web API endpoints; no new issues found","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-kfuj","title":"Feature: CLI Premium Pack Subscriptions + Update Notifications","description":"## Background
Pro users subscribe to premium prompt packs and expect updates to flow into their CLI without manual downloads.

## Scope
- CLI pack commands: `jfp packs subscribe/list/update/changelog`.
- Local cache with signed manifest and version history.
- Update notifications on new pack releases; optional auto‑update.
- License metadata + entitlement checks (Pro-only).
- Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content).

## Deliverables
- Pack subscription API endpoints + entitlement checks.
- CLI flows for subscribe/update and changelog viewing.
- Local cache format + integrity verification.
- Upgrade messaging for free users.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Manifest verification and cache integrity.
- Entitlement checks and error formatting.

### Integration Tests
- Subscribe -> update -> changelog with real API calls.
- Cache refresh on new pack release.

### E2E Tests
- Pro user subscribes -> pack content available in CLI.
- Free user attempt -> upgrade guidance.

## Success Criteria
- Pro users can keep packs up to date with minimal effort.
- Updates are secure and auditable.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:29.605565630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T17:59:13.538749684Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-kfuj","title":"Feature: CLI Premium Pack Subscriptions + Update Notifications","description":"## Background
Pro users subscribe to premium prompt packs and expect updates to flow into their CLI without manual downloads.

## Scope
- CLI pack commands: `jfp packs subscribe/list/update/changelog`.
- Local cache with signed manifest and version history.
- Update notifications on new pack releases; optional auto‑update.
- License metadata + entitlement checks (Pro-only).
- Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content).

## Deliverables
- Pack subscription API endpoints + entitlement checks.
- CLI flows for subscribe/update and changelog viewing.
- Local cache format + integrity verification.
- Upgrade messaging for free users.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Manifest verification and cache integrity.
- Entitlement checks and error formatting.

### Integration Tests
- Subscribe -> update -> changelog with real API calls.
- Cache refresh on new pack release.

### E2E Tests
- Pro user subscribes -> pack content available in CLI.
- Free user attempt -> upgrade guidance.

## Success Criteria
- Pro users can keep packs up to date with minimal effort.
- Updates are secure and auditable.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"QuietBasin","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:29.605565630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T06:31:31.840068979Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":35,"issue_id":"bd-kfuj","author":"QuietBasin","text":"Implemented CLI-side premium pack offline cache + update notifications + registry integration.

- Added pack cache storage under ~/.config/jfp/library/packs (manifest + per-pack JSON) with SHA-256 integrity check and bounded version history.
- jfp packs install/subscribe/update now best-effort caches pack detail for offline use (JSON output includes cache status).
- jfp packs uninstall removes cached payload + marks manifest installed=false.
- jfp packs list enriches output with cachedVersion/cachedAt + updateAvailable and renders an Update column.
- Registry loader now merges cached pack prompts into prompt registry across cache/remote/bundled paths so installed packs work offline.

Touched: packages/cli/src/lib/offline.ts, packages/cli/src/lib/registry-loader.ts, packages/cli/src/commands/premium-packs.ts, packages/cli/__tests__/lib/offline.test.ts.

Tests: bun run test:cli (pass).","created_at":"2026-02-06T06:31:31Z"}]}
